_README: Curated fixes applied on top of the parsed hierarchy (build_hierarchy_fry9c.py -> apply_overrides). 'captions' overrides a code's caption; 'force_rows' guarantees a row exists under a schedule key (key/mdrm/item/caption); 'drop_codes' removes a misparsed code. The force_rows below add codes the plain-text parser drops because they sit in matrix-style cells or notes lines without a clean leading item token. Items/captions verified against the form PDF (ReturnFinancialReportPDF.pdf) and the MDRM dictionary on 2026-06. Non-numeric 'Notes to the financial statements' text fields (5351-5360, B027-B056, etc.) are intentionally NOT added: they are free text, never charted, and are excluded by validate_build.py's panel-reported gate.
